What entities are present and what are they doing on the book cover?
canonical_answer: A cartoon pig wearing a colorful polka-dot dress stands near multiple colorful balloons in red, yellow, green, blue, and purple. Red capital letters at the top display the title 'IF YOU GIVE A PIG A PARTY' above the author's name. A red rectangular logo with white text reading 'SCHOLASTIC' appears at the bottom center. A small circular inset image shows another book cover in the top right corner.

question: Describe the visual changes to the main character and background elements throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 8 seconds, a pig in a polka-dot dress stands near balloons; at 10 seconds, author and illustrator names appear below the title; at 12 seconds, the pig wears pajamas and a cat book cover inset appears; at 14 seconds, the screen clears to empty background.

question: Outline the sequence of text and logo appearances from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 8 seconds, red title text appears at the top of the screen; at 10 seconds, a red Scholastic logo bar shows at the bottom; at 12 seconds, a circular inset displays another book title; at 14 seconds, all graphics vanish leaving a blank scene.
